title: After-Action Report — V3 closure attempt + continuous talent flow
scope: User accepted the Phase 11 close-out and asked to revisit follow-up #3: extend talent-weighting beyond the 2C-event scope. Plus a smaller fix request: count SI stats properly in game_pa_log.

rationale.item: No probabilistic gates. "We're gating talent weighting and it shouldn't be." The probabilistic gate (rng vs gate_p) on Path A was the wrong shape — talent should flow continuously into outcome, not as a binary probabilistic flip.

Plausibility over spec. "Don't keep preening on this to achieve some spec, i just want things that make sense." Stars distinctive, marginal players still useful, O27 feels structurally different from MLB.

delegation_events.decision: Remove probabilistic gating of talent weighting
delegation_events.quote: "We're gating talent weighting and it shouldn't be."
"Don't keep preening on this to achieve some spec, i just want things that make sense."

delegation_events.decision: V3 closure via run-chosen hit talent-weighting held
delegation_events.quote: Held; the user explicitly said don't keep iterating to hit specs.

actions.description: SI phase coverage in game_pa_log: new phase column (default 0 regulation; N>=1 for SI round N) with migration; capture_context snapshots state.super_inning_number as phase; INSERT path threads phase through

Continuous talent flow on 2C outcomes replacing Path A's probabilistic gate: talent_factor from eye/contact/command deviations maps to an expected advance value; rng resolves only the fractional remainder

risk_posture: Talent is the deterministic anchor... That's not a "magical RNG" — it's deterministic-anchored stochastic resolution.
Held to avoid re-opening Path 2 work.

validation_claims.claim: SI gap shrunk from ~16% to a small residual (~2-3% across the population)
validation_claims.check_method: Compare game_pa_log SI rows vs game stats on a fresh sim

validation_claims.claim: League shape after re-sim: PAVG .278, BAVG .331, stay_rate 5.72%, HR 4,497, R/team-game 12.44, 2C-Conv% 59.4%, stay_rbi% 4.26%
validation_claims.check_method: Re-run resetdb → sim 2430 → backfill_arc and compute the same metrics

validation_claims.claim: 2C-Conv% by eye decile: 38.2% (d1) to 80.8% (d10), spread 42.7pp, monotonic, no plateau
validation_claims.check_method: Decile query on a fresh sim DB

validation_claims.claim: Bottom-eye-decile mean stay_hits/season is 9.3, max 46; top-eye-decile mean 23.3, max 52
V3 (Δ by contact decile) still flat (.050 → .057 across deciles)

non_actions.reason: not reachable under the talent-on-2C scope. Closing it would mean retuning run-chosen safety-hit logic (out of scope; would re-open runner_advances_for_hit in o27/engine/baserunning.py)
abandoned at user's instruction ("ignore the spec, just do what makes sense"); user accepted top decile 81% vs spec 60-70% for shape monotonicity
preserved unchanged; still applies on swing 2+ via contact_quality's matchup_shift extension

residual_risks: PA log SI residual gap ~310/12,482 (~2.5%) — likely a few special-case events not threading through pa_log capture (jokers, certain SI mid-round transitions). Not blocking.
import math added in prob.py (unused after final iteration but kept)
Orphaned config constant TALENT_2C_SHIFT_SCALE in o27/config.py no longer referenced
open_hooks: V3 closure via run-chosen hit talent-weighting (held)
PA log SI residual gap investigation
swings_in_ab modifier in contact_quality could be simplified or removed (held)
section_headers_original: After-Action Report — V3 closure attempt + continuous talent flow
2. Continuous talent flow on 2C outcomes (replaces Path A gate)
unmapped_content: Header metadata: Branch claude/fix-dark-theme-baseball-terms-7UhIv; predecessors aar-phase-11-closeout.md, aar-second-chance-hits-and-eye-command-modifier.md. Code snippet of the fractional advance model and plausibility table (marginal/average/star expected advances) included in the document. V3 analysis: Δ measures BAVG-PAVG geometry which moves slowly because stay-credited hits are ~10-15% of total H; stay_h/PA scales with contact rating but aggregate Δ doesn't because BAVG and PAVG move together. Commits in session: 06fa387 (Phase 11D per-PA event log), 1d43c7e (Phase 11 close-out AAR), 1285ef7 (continuous talent flow + SI phase coverage), plus this AAR. Closing read: architecture now matches the user's principle; 2C-Conv% spreads monotonically 38%→81%; O27 plays differently from MLB at the talent margins; V3 parked, honestly diagnosable via the PA log decomposition.
